response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years experience bar with over a decade of full-stack work, strong TypeScript/Node.js exposure at recent roles (Acme, Pinepoint, RIDE), and direct AI-agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators. Background covers React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and TDD practices aligned with the role. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest specifically, and Kotlin/Java depth are minor and likely bridgeable given polyglot history.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with recent TypeScript/Node.js and React delivery at Acme and Pinepoint
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matching the role's AI requirement
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, Docker/Kubernetes, AWS
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions in resume despite being primary stack
Limited recent Kotlin/Java work; Java appears mainly in older robotics-era roles
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate stack preferences misaligned with team's TS-centric direction

key_factors.factor: Depth of full-stack tenure and craftsmanship practices
